heading: Duty to maintain tax-exempt status
label: 50108 Duty to maintain tax-exempt status
text: The corporation shall maintain its status as an organization exempt from taxation under the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 ( et seq.). If the corporation does not maintain that status, the charter granted by this chapter expires.26 U.S.C. 1
